---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] Short title"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### Summary
Briefly describe the feature you want.

### Use case / Motivation
Why is this feature useful? Who benefits?

### Proposed solution
Describe how you imagine this would work. Include API, UI, or UX sketches if relevant.

### Alternatives considered
List other approaches and why they were not chosen.

### Backwards compatibility / Migration
Any breaking changes or migration steps required.

### Additional context
Links, examples, or related issues.
